title: PDF Viewer fills viewport height — compact explorer (dbg90)
description:
The PDF Viewer scroll area was only a thin strip at the bottom because the unified file explorer and plan-view header consumed most of the vertical space, and the flex chain never allocated remaining height to the board body (absolute scrollport had nothing to fill).

dbg90 compacts the explorer in PDF Viewer mode, hides the long plan-view blurb, and fixes flex:1 1 0 from panel → subpanel → board host → viewer body so the dark scroll viewport grows to fill the rest of the screen (~5× taller than before).

Who is affected: OVH PipeSync PDF Viewer workspace.
changeLog: PDF Viewer scrollport fills remaining viewport below toolbar.
Unified explorer compact in PDF Viewer mode (smaller max-heights).
Flex chain panel → subpanel → board host → body uses flex 1 1 0.
Hide plan-view intro paragraph when continuous viewer active.
